auth.couldNotCreateAdmin: Could not create the administrator account.
auth.displayNameHelp: Optional — shown instead of your email.

auth.leaveBlankKeepPassword: Leave blank to keep your password.

auth.profileDisplayNameHelp: Shown instead of your email across the workspace.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
auth.setupFooter: You can add more users later from the user menu.
auth.setupSubtitle: Create the administrator account to get started.
auth.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your workspace to continue.

notifications.empty: Successful operations, errors, and system messages appear here.

projects.allSavedAlreadyOpen: All saved projects are already open.
projects.couldNotOpenDescription: "{{name}}" could not be loaded from the server.
projects.deleteProjectCardBody: Delete "{{name}}"? The project is removed from the server permanently.
projects.deleteProjectTabBody: Delete "{{name}}"? The project and its saved copy on the server are removed permanently. To keep it in your library, close the tab instead.

users.adminOnly: User management is available to administrators only.
users.administratorHelp: Can manage users and all workspace settings.
users.cannotChangeSelfRole: You cannot change your own role.
users.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account.
users.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
users.deleteBody: Delete {{name}}? Their account is removed permanently.
users.displayNameHelp: Optional — shown instead of the email.
users.leaveBlankPassword: Leave blank to keep the current password.
users.passwordGeneratedDescription: Reveal it with the eye icon and share it with the user securely.
users.title: Users

graphPreview.noCompiledGraph: No compiled graph is available for "{{graphId}}" yet.
graphPreview.title: {{title}} Graph Preview

hotkeys.description: Account-bound keybinds. Project-level overrides can layer on later without changing hotkey ids.
hotkeys.title: Hotkeys

models.accessTokenHelp: Attached to the next Pull only. For saved HuggingFace, Civitai, and provider keys, use the API Keys tab.
models.apiKeysDescription: Keys are used when installing protected models and when generating with external API models.
models.backendDisconnectedProgressStale: Backend disconnected. Progress may be stale.
models.bulkDeleteBody_one: Delete {{count}} selected model? Database records are removed, and files inside the InvokeAI models directory are deleted.
models.bulkDeleteBody_other: Delete {{count}} selected models? Database records are removed, and files inside the InvokeAI models directory are deleted.
models.convertBody: Convert "{{name}}" to the diffusers format in place? The original checkpoint file is replaced by a diffusers folder.
models.couldNotLoadInstallQueue: Could not load the install queue
models.civitaiKeyDescription: Attached automatically when installing civitai.com models that require login. Stored in this browser only.
models.defaultSettingsHelp: Applied automatically when this model is selected. Off = use the app default.
models.deleteBody: Delete "{{name}}"? The database record is removed, and the model files are deleted if they live inside the InvokeAI models directory.
models.failedToScanOrphaned: Failed to scan for orphaned models.
models.fileNotFoundOnDisk: The file for this model was not found on disk.
models.huggingFaceKeyDescription: For gated repos like FLUX. Stored on the InvokeAI server and verified with HuggingFace.
models.huggingFaceRejectedToken: HuggingFace rejected this token. Check that it has read access.
models.noInstallableModelFiles: This HuggingFace repo has no installable model files.
models.noInstallsDescription: Model installs appear here while they download and import.
models.noStarterModelsPull: No starter models match - press Pull to install the source you entered.
models.noStarterModelsSearch: No starter models match your search.
models.noneInstalledDescription: Use Add Models to install your first model.
models.noneMatchFiltersDescription: Try clearing the search or filters.
models.noOrphaned: No orphaned model folders found — your library is clean.
models.orphanedDescription: Folders in the models directory with no database record — usually leftovers from failed installs or external deletes.
models.relatedModelsHelp: Link the models that pair well with this one - they are suggested together elsewhere in the app.
models.scanFolderTooltip: Scan this folder for model files
models.searchOrAddPlaceholder: Search models, or paste a URL, file path, or Hugging Face repo
models.selectModelDescription: Pick a model from the library to view details, edit metadata, set per-model defaults, and manage trigger phrases.
models.someCouldNotBeDeleted: Some models could not be deleted
models.title: Models
models.toFindModelsInFolder: to find models in this folder.
models.triggerPhraseDuplicate: That trigger phrase is already on this model.
models.triggerPhrasesHelp: Phrases that activate this model, surfaced in the prompt editor.
models.useSupportedImage: Use a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
models.variantHelp: Architecture variant, e.g. inpaint or dev.

nodes.couldNotLoadPacks: Could not load custom node packs
nodes.dependenciesRequiredDescription: {{name}} requires dependencies from {{dependencyFile}}. Install them, then restart InvokeAI.
nodes.gitUrlHelp: Paste a public Git repository URL. InvokeAI clones it into your custom nodes directory.
nodes.noPacksDescription: Install from a Git URL or place packs in your custom nodes directory, then reload.
nodes.noPreviewsDescription: The backend has no node definitions for this pack yet. Reload nodes or restart InvokeAI to load them.
nodes.noRecentActivityDescription: Install or uninstall a node pack and the outcome shows up here.
nodes.scanFolderDescription: Add node packs directly to the custom nodes directory, then reload nodes. InvokeAI scans this folder on startup and reload.
nodes.selectPackDescription: Choose a pack from the library to see its path, manage it, and preview every node it adds.
nodes.trustWarning: Custom nodes execute Python code. Only install packs from authors you trust.
nodes.uninstallBody: Remove this pack from the custom nodes directory? A restart is required for removal to fully apply.

launchpad.projectsSubtitle: Pick up where you left off, or start something new.

settings.title: Settings
settings.descriptionGlobal: Global preferences for this single-user install. Project settings apply only to the active project.
settings.descriptionUser: Preferences for the signed-in user. Project settings apply only to the active project.
settings.languageDescription: Interface language. New workbench copy falls back to English until translators add coverage.

shell.deleteLayoutPresetBody: Delete "{{name}}"? This only removes the saved preset.

generate.addConceptsHelp: Add LoRAs/concepts here to blend them into this generation.
generate.couldNotGeneratePromptFromImage: Could not generate a prompt from the selected image.
generate.denoisingStrengthHelp: How much the generation reworks the existing canvas content. Only applies to image-to-image (when content fills the generation frame).
generate.installTextLlmToExpandPrompts: Install a Text LLM model to expand prompts.
generate.installVisionModelToGeneratePrompts: Install a LLaVA OneVision model to generate prompts from images.
generate.promptHistoryKeyboardHelp: Alt+Up/Down switches between prompts while focused.
generate.cropReferenceImageHelp: Drag the crop box to move it, or drag its handles to resize. Apply to create a cropped reference image.
generate.referenceImagesHelp: Upload an image or drag images from Gallery here.
generate.referenceImagesUnsupported: Reference images are not supported by the selected model.
generate.styleVariantPreciseDesc: Applies a precise visual style, eliminating subject influence.
generate.styleVariantStandardDesc: Applies visual style (colors, textures) without considering its layout. Previously called Style Only.
generate.styleVariantStrongDesc: Applies a strong visual style, with a slightly reduced composition influence.
generate.selectImageFirst: Select an image in Gallery or Preview first.
generate.selectMainModelBeforeConcepts: Select a main model before adding concepts.
generate.setOptimalSizeDescription: Set size to the model's optimal pixel count
generate.usingBundledVae: Using the VAE bundled with the model.

project.deleteRecoveryBody: Delete "{{name}}"? The recovery copy is removed permanently.
project.recoveryForkedDescription: Forked {{time}} after this project was changed elsewhere.

preview.emptyDescription: Generate to Gallery, then select a thumbnail in the Gallery widget to inspect it here.

queue.allScopedItemsRequested: All scoped queue items were requested.
queue.cancelAllExceptCurrentRequested: All pending scoped items except the current item were requested.
queue.cancelConfirmationBody: This requests cancellation for queue work in the current scope. In-progress items may stop after the backend acknowledges cancellation.
queue.clearFailedConfirmationBody: This permanently removes failed queue items in the current queue scope.
queue.clearQueueConfirmationBody: This permanently clears queue items in the current queue scope.
queue.couldNotCancelCurrentItem: Could not cancel the current item.
queue.couldNotCancelItems: Could not cancel scoped queue items.
queue.couldNotChangeProcessor: Could not change the queue processor.
queue.couldNotClearFailedItems: Could not clear failed queue items.
queue.filterRecentByStatus: Filter recent queue items by status

modelCache.couldNotClear: Could not clear the model cache.
modelCache.label: Model Cache
modelCache.noModelsClearedDescription: No unlocked cached models were available to clear. Active models stay loaded until they are no longer in use.

queue.noCurrentItemDescription: The scoped queue has no in-progress item to cancel.
queue.recallFromGallery: Recall this generation from the gallery
queue.sendToCanvasComingSoon: Sending queue results to the canvas is coming soon.

controls.newCanvasConfirm: Clear all layers and start a fresh canvas? This cannot be undone.

toolOptions.lassoHint: Draw a shape to select. Shift adds, Alt subtracts.

workflow.author: Author
workflow.name: Workflow name
workflow.noTemplateKnown: No template is known for "{{type}}" on this backend.
workflow.runOutputsNotRecorded: Run outputs are not recorded per node yet; results currently route to the Gallery or Canvas. This tab will show the node's outputs from its most recent run once run records land.
workflow.selectNodeToInspect: Select a node in the Workflow editor to inspect it.
workflow.title: Title

adjustments.curvesHint: Drag points to bend the curve. Double-click empty space to add a point; double-click a point to remove it.
adjustments.title: Adjustments

layers.denoisingStrengthHelp: How much the canvas image is changed. Lower keeps more of the original; higher allows bigger changes.
layers.empty: No layers yet. Add a layer or paint on the canvas to get started.

groupActions.exportNothing: No raster layer content to export
groupActions.exportNotReady: Layers are still loading — try exporting again in a moment
groupActions.exportTooLarge: Canvas is too large to export to PSD
groupActions.mergeNotReady: Layers are still loading — try merging again in a moment

regionalGuidance.referenceImageHelp: Upload or drag an image from the gallery.

commands.selectAllOnPage: Select all gallery images on page

gallery.deleteBoardDescription: Deleted boards cannot be restored. Choose whether the board's images move to Uncategorized or are permanently deleted with it.
gallery.noImagesMatch: No images match this board, tab, or search.
gallery.uploadsUnavailableForDateBoards: Uploads are unavailable for date boards
